MINI MINUTES: Appearances: TIMOTHY C. HALE, ESQ., 805.963.2345, FOR PLAINTIFF JOHN FD ROE.
MICHELLE PEPPER, ESQ., 559.449.0571, FOR DEFENDANTS DIOCESE OF FRESNO AND THE ROMAN CATHOLIC BISHOP OF FRESNO.

jUDGE MILLER discloseS at the hearing that she is a member of the same Inn of Court as attorney Sigrid Irias. This will not affect the Judge's ability to be fair and impartial in this case.

RULING: MATTER ARGUED. Defendants Roman Catholic Bishop Of Fresno And Diocese Of Fresno Education Corporation's Demurrer To Complaint IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

jUDGE MILLER discloseS at the hearing that she is a member of the same Inn of Court as attorney Sigrid Irias. This will not affect the Judge's ability to be fair and impartial in this case.

RULING: MATTER ARGUED. IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 1ST AND 9TH CAUSES OF ACTION AND SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 3RD, 5TH AND 10TH CAUSES OF ACTION.
